description_long: This is a metallic bracelet featuring a double-spiral motif at each end, crafted from a hammered, textured metal band. The band is coiled into an open, adjustable form, allowing it to wrap around the wrist. The spirals are prominent and symmetrical, giving the piece a bold, geometric appearance. The surface of the metal is uneven and slightly reflective, with visible hammer marks that add to its artisanal character. The color is a muted gold or bronze, suggesting it may be made from brass or a similar alloy. The overall design is both striking and minimal, with the spirals serving as the main decorative element.
description: A hammered metal bracelet with double spiral ends and a textured, gold-bronze finish. The open, coiled design wraps around the wrist with bold geometric flair.
description_view_0: The bracelet is seen from above, clearly showing both spiral ends and the open, coiled structure.
description_view_1: A side view highlights the thickness of the band and the open gap between the spirals.
description_view_2: The spirals are most prominent from this top-down angle, emphasizing the symmetrical design.
description_view_3: Another side view, showing the profile of the spirals and the curvature of the band.
